title: selaginella contigua
intro: Selaginella contigua is a species of spore-producing plant in the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as the spike moss. This plant is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Selaginella contigua include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce stress levels. In herbal preparations, Selaginella contigua is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, and poultices, with the dried leaves and stems being used to treat various ailments.
